next_steps: Perform contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) of the chest
Consult pediatric surgery regarding surgical resection of cystic mass
Perform genetic testing for DICER1 mutation
Perform genetic counseling for the family
Monitor renal function given the concurrent urinary tract anomalies

differential_diagnoses: Congenital pulmonary airway malformation (CPAM) with superinfected cystic spaces
Persistent pneumonia/necrotizing pneumonia with pulmonary abscess
next_steps: Contrast-enhanced computed tomography (CT) of the chest to differentiate cystic from solid components and identify systemic arterial blood supply
Bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) with quantitative bacterial, fungal, and viral cultures to guide antimicrobial therapy
Consultation with pediatric surgery for potential mass resection
Multidisciplinary review of imaging with pediatric radiology to re-evaluate for occult fetal lung mass
Genetic counseling for the family regarding DICER1-related syndromes
